creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Rene Ladan from comment #18)
...or use the opportunity remove the old cruft that's unmaintained etc? If any ports are still relevant I'm quite sure we can easily find patches.

Such as:
https://sources.debian.org/patches/docbook-utils/0.6.14-4/remove-jade-sp.patch/
